keyFeatures.en: Compress images to reduce file size without losing quality
keyFeatures.zh: 压缩图片以减少文件大小而不丢失质量

keyFeatures.en: Supports a wide range of image formats

description.en: No ads, unlimited compressions, up to 5MB file size
description.zh: 无广告，无限压缩次数，最大5MB文件大小

weaknesses.en: Limited file size for free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐文件大小有限制
没有订阅无法使用高级功能

positioning.en: A simple and effective tool for compressing images
positioning.zh: 一个简单有效的图片压缩工具
